mapper.insert: insert into toss_connections ( user_id, connection_name, client_id, client_secret_encrypted, client_secret_masked, status, is_primary ) values ( #{connection.userId}, #{connection.connectionName}, #{connection.clientId}, #{connection.clientSecretEncrypted}, #{connection.clientSecretMasked}, #{connection.status}, #{connection.isPrimary} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id, connection_name, client_id, client_secret_encrypted, client_secret_masked, status, last_token_issued_at, last_sync_at, last_sync_status, last_sync_error_code, last_sync_error_message, is_primary, created_at, updated_at from toss_connections where user_id = #{userId} order by is_primary desc, created_at desc

select id, user_id, connection_name, client_id, client_secret_encrypted, client_secret_masked, status, last_token_issued_at, last_sync_at, last_sync_status, last_sync_error_code, last_sync_error_message, is_primary, created_at, updated_at from toss_connections where id = #{connectionId} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update toss_connections set is_primary = false, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and is_primary = true
update toss_connections set is_primary = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{connectionId}
update toss_connections set last_token_issued_at = #{lastTokenIssuedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{connectionId}
mapper.insert: insert into toss_accounts ( connection_id, account_seq, account_type, account_no_masked, display_name, status, is_active, last_synced_at ) values ( #{connectionId}, #{accountSeq}, #{accountType}, #{accountNoMasked}, #{displayName}, 'ACTIVE', true, #{lastSyncedAt} ) on conflict (connection_id, account_seq) do update set account_type = excluded.account_type, account_no_masked = excluded.account_no_masked, display_name = excluded.display_name, status = 'ACTIVE', is_active = true, last_synced_at = excluded.last_synced_at, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select id, connection_id, account_seq, account_type, account_no_masked, display_name, status, is_selected, is_active, last_synced_at, created_at, updated_at from toss_accounts where connection_id = #{connectionId} and is_active = true order by is_selected desc, created_at asc

select ta.id, ta.connection_id, ta.account_seq, ta.account_type, ta.account_no_masked, ta.display_name, ta.status, ta.is_selected, ta.is_active, ta.last_synced_at, ta.created_at, ta.updated_at from toss_accounts ta join toss_connections tc on tc.id = ta.connection_id where ta.id = #{accountId} and tc.user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update toss_accounts set is_selected = false, updated_at = now() where connection_id = #{connectionId} and is_selected = true
update toss_accounts set is_selected = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{accountId}
